linkedin_company_description: Duke University spin-out, Deep Blue Medical Advances has developed a novel hernia mesh to address the unacceptably high rate of hernia occurrence and recurrence. Millions of hernia surgeries are done globally with billions of dollars in clinical cost.Our surgeon-invented T-Line® Hernia Mesh with integral suture-like extensions is designed to eliminate a key point of failure for conventional mesh fixation - the mesh, suture, tissue interface - and to provide superior anchor strength. In addition, several additional products are in development, including an anchor clip for even faster, easier implantation; a biosynthetic version of the T-Line Hernia Mesh; and a coated composite version of the T-Line Mesh. Deep Blue products enhance hernia surgery with a potentially significant impact on the $1.1B global hernia device market. Due to its simple yet revolutionary design, the T-Line® Hernia Mesh has the potential to reduce hernia occurrence and recurrence by preventing or reducing mesh fixation failure.

linkedin_company_description: Starlight Therapeutic is an emerging precision oncology company focused solely on CNS (central nervous system) cancers, primarily brain cancers.It is estimated that there are over 120 subtypes of CNS cancers that have a devastating impact on adult and pediatric populations. Most of these CNS cancers do not have effective therapies and current treatment relies on a combination of surgery, radiotherapy, and chemotherapy. There is a significant need for new therapeutic options to improve patient outcomes. Starlight is developing our lead drug candidate, known as STAR-001, for some of the most unaddressed brain cancers. STAR-001, we believe, has the potential to be effective in both primary and secondary (metastatic) brain cancers as demonstrated in multiple preclinical cancer models. Starlight’s initial focus is developing STAR-001 for CNS cancers including adult glioblastoma, adult brain metastases, and pediatric brain cancers such as atypical teratoid rhabdoid tumors (ATRT).

linkedin_company_description: Our goal is to eliminate preventable brain injury at birth, reduce the rate of unnecessary caesarean sections, and improve outcomes for both the mother and baby. Fetal heart rate monitoring is used in 90% of labors to assess the baby's neurological health and has been associated with a 5x increase in C-section rates. Despite decades of use, it has not decreased fetal brain injury and has been associated with an adverse trend in overall C-section rates, resulting in extremely high maternal morbidity and mortality. Electroencephalogram (EEG), measuring brain waves via electrodes, is a more accurate and earlier indicator of the baby's neurological health. However the previously proven method is invasive, requiring a scalp electrode on the baby during labor, and is not feasible at scale or in varying fetal positions. We have developed a new, non-invasive method & technology that harnesses the clinical promise of EEG without compromising the health of the mother or baby. Better monitoring will lead to better outcomes both for mother and child, in terms of avoiding brain injury during delivery and avoiding unnecessary C-sections and better matching C-sections or other interventions to clinically appropriate situations.

linkedin_company_description: HousingIntellect is a compliance management platform designed for the affordable housing industry. The platform helps property management companies, compliance teams, and asset managers streamline certification file reviews, manage supporting documentation, perform compliance related calculations, and track deficiencies across properties and portfolios.Affordable housing compliance involves detailed review processes, accurate calculations, and consistent documentation across multiple regulatory programs. HousingIntellect was built to bring these activities into one structured system, allowing teams to organize certification files, review household documentation, identify discrepancies, and manage corrections in a more efficient and consistent way.The platform centralizes key components of compliance operations including document uploads, certification file review, deficiency tracking, compliance calculations, and regulatory document organization. By reducing reliance on spreadsheets, scattered files, and disconnected workflows, HousingIntellect helps teams maintain stronger oversight and better organization across their compliance activities.Organizations can use HousingIntellect in the way that best supports their operations. Property management companies and internal compliance teams can use the software to conduct their own file reviews and manage compliance workflows directly within the platform. Alternatively, organizations can engage the HousingIntellect compliance team to perform file reviews and compliance support through the same system, providing additional expertise and capacity when needed.HousingIntellect is designed for professionals working across regulated housing programs such as LIHTC, HUD, HOME, and other affordable housing initiatives where accurate documentation, calculations, and oversight are critical.The platform is currently preparing for launch and is working with select organizations through an early pilot program.

linkedin_company_description: SimpliFed is democratizing access to baby feeding and breastfeeding services by providing high-quality virtual care that is covered by insurance. The Ithaca, New York-based company envisions a world where every parent feels good about feeding their family – because baby feeding and breastfeeding is central to maternal and infant health. Founded in 2019 by Andrea Ippolito, a biomedical engineer and mom of two, SimpliFed provides evidence-based and inclusive virtual baby feeding services to everyone, no matter how they choose to feed their baby. linkedin_company_description: HeyDonto is built for the future of healthcare data.AI is changing how healthcare data works. HeyDonto is an AI-native data intelligence platform for human health, dental, and animal health. We don’t just connect systems—we apply intelligence to data so it becomes interoperable, trustworthy, and usable across clinical, operational, and research domains as data evolves over time.HeyDonto ingests both structured and unstructured healthcare data—including FHIR, HL7, X12, notes, and documents—and produces clean, standards-aligned, AI-ready data in the formats organizations need. Interoperability is the outcome, not the pitch.Unlike traditional integration platforms that rely on static mappings and manual maintenance, HeyDonto is built from the ground up with AI as the foundation. Our platform continuously learns what data means, how it relates, and how it changes over time—so intelligence stays intact as systems, schemas, and workflows evolve.HeyDonto is used by hospitals and health systems, dental organizations, and veterinary technology companies that need reliable, longitudinal data for analytics, operations, and AI in real-world production environments.
